conditional_statement: If J_tau[lambda_w] has the target-stationary closure form with positive stiffness, Vflat^2 is the Tau-side asymptotic carrier, and the source factors sigma_warp, q_warp, and x_w enter separably with suppressed cross terms, then the stationary normalization is lambda_w = sigma_warp q_warp x_w Vflat^2.
